label: Batch Grid Link
description: CTA button to open the DimensionalGrid for batch strategy analysis and multi-strategy comparison.

0.6.note: pure UI action panel, no data fetching.

1.1.note: pure UI action panel — no data dependency.

l1.notes: Pure UI widget — renders a static navigation button. No data dependency.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea. Re-audit only if entitlements change.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live N/A, paper N/A, batch ✓ (CTA specifically for batch analysis in DimensionalGrid).

3.2.note: Widget does not read mode — pure navigation button.

3.5.note: Paper mode: button still navigates to grid — expected.

3.4.note: No data to indicate batch mode for.

l3.notes: Agent checks complete. Widget is mode-agnostic. No human verify needed beyond 3.4 (n/a).

4.1.note: No dead onClick handlers. Button is a Link wrapper — navigation is the action.

4.2.note: Link href='/services/trading/strategies/grid' — route exists at app/(platform)/services/trading/strategies/grid/. VERIFIED.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render path.

4.3.note: Human verify: button navigates to DimensionalGrid page.

4.4.note: No form fields or submit actions.

4.8.note: Human verify: button fills widget width at minH=1.

l4.notes: Route verified. Agent checks pass. Human must verify 4.3, 4.8.

5.1.note: Target strategies: all strategies — widget is a navigation CTA to batch analysis grid. Not tied to a specific strategy type.

l5.notes: 5.1 documented. L5 walkthrough minimal for this widget (just verify navigation).

l6.notes: L1.5 harness spec: 6 tests covering render, link href (/services/trading/strategies/grid), button text (DimensionalGrid, Batch Analysis), button not disabled, full-width container. See tests/widgets/strategies/strategies-grid-link.test.tsx

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

l7.notes: All mechanical checks pass. Simplest widget in domain.

8.4.note: Button is semantic. Link wraps button — accessible navigation pattern.

8.5.note: Human verify: button displays correctly at minW=4, minH=1.

l8.notes: 8.1-8.4 all pass — second cleanest L8 in domain. 8.5 human-verify pending.

keepSeparate.rationale: CTA/action widgets are intentionally small and separate. Merging into another widget would bury the DimensionalGrid entry point.

relationships.notes: Standalone CTA widget. Navigation-only — links to /services/trading/strategies/grid. Singleton.

dataContract.notes: No data contract — pure navigation widget. No backend dependency.

coverage.notes: No coverage gaps — widget is a navigation CTA with no data rendering.

findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
